title: External integration account linked to Monday account

posts.author: edmonds (Edmond Shapiro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Note this expands upon same issue as here: 52343

As each user of a board has a different Monday account, it doesn’t make sense to link integrations to a single users account.

Rather it would be more effective to link external integration accounts to the users monday account.

Some examples:

Gmail integration - if a board has a button to send a gmail email, then the email that is associated with the automation should dynamically pick a gmail account associated with the monday user and not with the board.

Jira 2 way integration - When there is a 2 way integration with Jira, the Jira reporter should be the Jira account associated with the monday user and not with the board.

Thanks,

Edmond
